title: Email Account Locked
description: Troubleshooting a locked email account, including verifying the lock status and basic recovery steps.

steps.title: Verify the Account Is Actually Locked
steps.instruction:
*🔍 Step 1: Verify the Account Is Actually Locked*
• Open your browser and go directly to your email provider's web login:
  - Zoho: `https://mail.zoho.com`
  - Outlook/Microsoft 365: `https://outlook.office.com`
  - Gmail: `https://mail.google.com`
• Try logging in with your email and password.
• Check the exact error message shown — does it say *Account Locked*, *Suspended*, or *Incorrect Password*?
_Expected: You can confirm whether the account is locked, just has a wrong password, or has another issue._

steps.title: Wait and Retry (Temporary Lockout)
steps.instruction:
*⏱️ Step 2: Wait and Retry (Temporary Lockout)*
• Email accounts auto-lock after multiple failed login attempts.
• Wait *15–30 minutes* without trying to log in again, then retry.
• Make sure Caps Lock is OFF before entering your password.
• Try entering your password slowly and carefully.
_Expected: Temporary lockout clears after the wait period._

steps.title: Check on a Different Device or Browser
steps.instruction:
*💻 Step 3: Check on a Different Device or Browser*
• Try logging into your email on a different device (e.g., phone or another laptop).
• Or try a different browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox) or an Incognito window.
• This confirms whether the issue is with your device or the actual account.
_Expected: If login works on another device, the issue is browser/device-specific._

steps.title: Check for Suspicious Activity Notifications
steps.instruction:
*🔔 Step 4: Check for Suspicious Activity Notifications*
• Look for any email from your IT team or email provider in a backup/personal email account.
• IT may have locked your account due to a security policy or suspicious login attempt.
• Check your phone — some providers send an SMS alert when your account is locked.
_Expected: You find a notification explaining why the account was locked._

steps.title: Raise a Ticket with IT Support
steps.instruction:
*🎫 Step 5: Raise a Ticket with IT Support*
• If steps above don't resolve it, raise a support ticket.
• Provide the following in your ticket:
  - Your email address
  - When the issue started
  - The error message you see when trying to log in
  - Your Employee ID
• IT will verify your identity and unlock the account for you.
_Expected: IT team unlocks the account and confirms access._
